description: You are a robotics engineer analyzing the shared workspace between two robot arms. Create two overlapping Part Box primitives in FreeCAD and find their intersection (common volume). Create a box labeled 'Arm_A_Workspace' with dimensions 80x60x50 mm at position (0,0,0) and a second box labeled 'Arm_B_Workspace' with dimensions 70x50x50 mm at position (40,20,0). Find the intersection of these two volumes and save the result as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/workspace_intersection.FCStd.
